dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we're about to make a terrible mistake, and I'm the only one who sees it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A scout returned claiming they found an {enemy_type} camp {location_hint}. The militia is arming up. But I spoke to {target_npc}, who traveled that road recently, and they described something very different from what the scout reported. The scout saw what they expected to see, not what was actually there.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need you to reach the {quest_focus} before the militia does and bring back {quest_item} as proof of what's really there. If they attack the wrong target, the {quest_stakes} will pay the price. {quest_reward_hint} could follow.

dialogueChunks.intro: They're blaming {target_npc} for the sickness, {player_name}. And they're wrong. Dead wrong.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: People fell ill after contact with the {quest_focus}. Someone started a rumor that {target_npc} caused it, because {target_npc} was seen adding something to the {quest_focus} recently. What nobody bothered to ask is that {target_npc} was treating it with purifying agents because they noticed contamination upstream.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find {target_npc} {location_hint} before the mob does. They can explain what really happened, and their testimony is the only thing that will clear their name. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} driving this witch hunt. The {quest_stakes} depends on the truth.

dialogueChunks.intro: Everyone loves the new arrival, {player_name}. Everyone except me.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A newcomer has been offering {quest_item} at prices that make no sense. Too cheap, too generous, too eager. {target_npc} is suspicious too but was shouted down. I've noticed the newcomer making trips {location_hint} at night, and the {enemy_type} attacks have shifted to target everywhere except routes the newcomer uses. That's not coincidence.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need you to find {target_npc} and hear what they've observed. Together your accounts might be enough to convince the others. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} too convenient. The {quest_threat} lurks behind generosity this suspicious. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} at risk. {quest_reward_hint} awaits if you uncover the truth.
